title: Rich Roasted Kenyan Meat Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Kenya, featuring tender rest-meat and a blend of aromatic spices, including dill. This dish is perfect for adventurous eaters looking for a rich and satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large earthenware bowl, combine the rest-meat, dill, onion, and garlic.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the tomato paste and beef broth.
Add the broth mixture to the earthenware bowl and stir to combine.
Add the potato and carrot to the bowl and stir to combine.
Cover the bowl with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Remove the bowl from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
